_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about how the people and places around us influence our identity, and how we can build a positive view of ourselves.

_source.w: We are learning about how the people and places around us influence our identity, and how we can build a positive view of ourselves.
y: Identity is shaped by many factors — understanding them helps us take control of our own story.
Building a positive self-identity supports our mental health and resilience.
Knowing what influences us helps us make more deliberate choices about who we want to be.
eg: Discussing how family, friends, media, and culture shape our sense of self.
Identifying strategies for building positive self-identity — like setting goals and celebrating strengths.
Exploring how connection to place — including Country for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander students — influences identity.
Analysing how media messages can both positively and negatively affect self-image.
Discussing how moving to a new place can change how we see ourselves.
Creating a personal identity map showing the influences that shape who we are.
